zh.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles是Jean de Ghistelles III和Marguerite De Luxembourg的兒子，於1286年出生。他於大約1337年與Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年8月26日在法國皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年60歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆拉斯艾格利 諾特-達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles是Jean de Ghistelles III和Marguerite De Luxembourg的儿子，于1286年出生。他于大约1337年与Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年8月26日在法国皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額享年60岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆拉斯艾格利 諾特-達。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles was born in 1286 as the son of Jean de Ghistelles III and Marguerite De Luxembourg. He married Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse about 1337. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 26 August 1346, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles est né en 1286, fils de Jean de Ghistelles III et Marguerite De Luxembourg. Il a épousé Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse environ 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 26 août 1346, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles wurde 1286, als Sohn von Jean de Ghistelles III und Marguerite De Luxembourg geboren. Er hat um 1337 Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 26. August 1346 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles è nato il nel 1286 come figlio di Jean de Ghistelles III e Marguerite De Luxembourg. Lui sposato Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse circa 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 agosto 1346, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistellesは1286年にJean de Ghistelles IIIとMarguerite De Luxembourgの息子として生まれた。約1337年にMarie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年8月26日にフランスピカーディソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウで60歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンラスンエグリゼ ノトレ-ダムにて埋葬された。

ko.Ghistelles (église Notre Dame ): 벨기에 브라반트 월런 라스니 그리스 노트레-다
ko.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles(은)는 1286년 Jean de Ghistelles III(와)과 Marguerite De Luxembourg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1337년 Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 8월 26일 프랑스 피카디 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 라스니 그리스 노트레-다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles nasceu em 1286 filho de Jean de Ghistelles III e Marguerite De Luxembourg. Ele casou-se com Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse aproximadamente 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1346, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles родился в 1286 г. Его родителей звали Jean de Ghistelles III и Marguerite De Luxembourg. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse около 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 26 августа 1346 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности эглис нотре-дэм, ласн, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Chevalier Jean De Ghistelles nació en 1286 como hijo de Jean de Ghistelles III y Marguerite De Luxembourg. Se casó con Marie, Dame de Straaten, van Renesse aproximadamente 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1346, en Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Eglise Notre-Dame, Lasne, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
